description: An all-time favourite accessory, belts form an integral part of dressing. This beige and brown signature canvas belt from lee is set to pump up your style and add zing to your attire.. Length: 80 cms Made of canvas with leather stitched to the ends and on either side of the belt for enhanced style and durability Metallic loops to offer a snug Fit and to hold the belt in place Broad base to sit snug on the waist Brand symbol embossed on the leather Care Wipe surface with a clean, dry cloth to remove dust Use a leather conditioner to protect the leather if necessary
